prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Honda B18C5 (Integra Type R)** with a **Hasport Performance EG/EK to Del Sol swap kit**, retaining the OEM cable throttle body for authentic response. Pair with a **Toda Racing B18C5 stroker kit (87mm crank, 84mm pistons, 11.5:1 compression)** and **Toda Racing Stage 3 headwork (port-matched, oversized valves, titanium retainers)**. Use a **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** with a **70mm throttle body** and **RC Engineering 320cc injectors** for precise fueling. ECU tuning via **Hondata S300 v3** with a custom **Del Sol-specific base map** optimized for 9,500 RPM redline and 220+ whp on 93 octane.

Forced induction setup using a **Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.64 A/R, 56 trim)** on a **Custom Fabrication Services (CFS) B-series turbo manifold** with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve**. Intercooled with a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler** and **3-inch aluminum piping** with a **Mishimoto X-line silicone coupler kit**. Fuel system upgrades include a **Walbro 255 LPH in-tank pump**, **AEM 320cc high-impedance injectors**, and a **Hondata Boost Controller** for 12 psi of boost, targeting 300 whp on E85 with a **Hondata K-Pro v4** tune.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Del Sol-specific valving, 8kg/mm front/6kg/mm rear springs)** paired with **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set, including rear trailing arm bushings)**. Front end reinforced with a **Cusco 2-point strut bar** and **Spoon Sports rear lower tie bar**. Braking upgraded to **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (11-inch rotors front, 10-inch rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**. LSD swap to a **Torsen Type-S limited-slip differential (from a 1998 Integra GS-R)** with **Motul Gear 300 75W-90 fluid**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Del Sol widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper, rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Gloss Black wrap** and **JDM-spec yellow turn signals**. Rear wing replaced with a **Seibon Carbon Kevlar GT-style wing (22-inch span, 3-inch risers)** mounted on **NRG Innovations quick-release aluminum pedestals**. Front lip upgraded to a **Charge Speed JDM-style lip** with **carbon fiber splitter extensions**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD (Del Sol-specific mounts)** and **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**. Dashboard replaced with a **Spoon Sports carbon fiber gauge cluster (380mm tach, oil pressure, water temp)** and **Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, AFR, EGT)** mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**. Steering wheel swapped for a **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede)** with a **NRG quick-release hub**. Sound deadening via **Dynamat Xtreme** and **custom Alcantara headliner**.

Lightweight **Enkei RPF1 wheels (15x8 +25 front, 15x9 +30 rear)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear)**. OEM pop-up headlights retained but upgraded with **Morimoto HID projectors (35W, 5000K)** and **custom LED halo rings**. Rear taillights replaced with **JDM-spec Honda Civic EK9 clear tails** with **red/amber LED bulbs**. Engine bay detailed with **carbon fiber valve cover (Spoon Sports)**, **anodized gold hardware (ARP head studs, Earl’s braided lines)**, and **custom aluminum radiator support delete**.
